name: Civic Park
description: Come play pickleball at Civic Park in LaBelle, FL! There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: RiverBend RV Resort
description: RiverBend RV Resort is a place to play pickleball in LaBelle, FL. There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water. Reservations are not available.
fees: Members only — Must be RiverBend resident.
